what_we_add: We show 7/8 host-pathogen structural pairs share ZERO taxa, with a DCA positive control (AUC 0.61) proving the math works but pairing is undefined — turning an assumption into a measured, kingdom-crossing wall.

closest_prior_work: Starr 2020 & Greaney 2021 map RBD-ACE2 constraint & escape by deep mutational scanning
what_we_add: We recast that biology as a co-speciation-FREE coevolutionary signal: interface residues vary 4.2x more across strains (perm p=1e-4), computable from strain sequences + one structure, no DMS experiment.

closest_prior_work: Coevolution→contact is the core DCA premise (Morcos 2011; Green 2021)
what_we_add: Clean negative (rho=-0.04): within-pathogen strain covariation reflects shared immune-escape selection, NOT structural contact — a boundary condition prior work did not isolate.
8-system cross-kingdom test: significant in 3, null for HIV (shields receptor site); fold-change misleads without an absolute-entropy floor. Generality mapped, not assumed.

closest_prior_work: ESM-2 / PLM-PPI methods report strong pooled metrics (Lin 2023; Bryant 2022)
what_we_add: Under strict leave-one-species-out on a species-balanced benchmark, transfer collapses to phylogenetic proximity (0.49 isolated → 0.73-0.80 with a relative). The honest failure mode, made measurable.

our_finding: Arms-race asymmetry as a transferable feature
closest_prior_work: MSA pairing without a tree: DiffPALM (Lupo 2024); MSA Transformer (Rao 2021)
what_we_add: An 8-dim masked-LM asymmetry block lifts LOSO transfer 0.568→0.581, helping 8/13 species, viral-biased — a lightweight, pairing-free complement to the heavier DiffPALM route.
Stage-3 AF3 pilot on real host-pathogen complexes: iPTM 0.11-0.70, interface F1 up to 0.63, quantifying the weak cross-species interface signal our coevolution features are meant to strengthen.

our_finding: AF3 confidence does not rescue no-relative species
closest_prior_work: AF2/AF3 interface confidence discriminates interactors within a proteome (Bryant 2022; Humphreys 2021; Abramson 2024)
what_we_add: Targeted test on the hardest no-relative species (B. anthracis) vs SARS-CoV-2 control: AF3 ipTM does NOT separate true from decoy host-pathogen pairs (pooled AUC 0.50, all ipTM<0.5). A negative that extends the sequence-embedding transfer failure to structure-based confidence (pilot; shallow-MSA caveat, n=7).
